metadata.description: Selamy Labs public, generic MCP servers distributed as a versioned Claude Code plugin. Workloads add this marketplace and enable the plugin, pinned by tag/SHA, instead of copying server configs around.

plugins.name: agent-mcp
plugins.description: Generic MCP servers from Selamy Labs. Currently bundles datakit (deterministic data utilities: hashing, base64, UUIDv5, canonical JSON, JSON diff, and timezone-correct datetime math).
